[cron:a1000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000003 pipeline-synthesizer] You are a synthesis agent in a 3-stage analysis pipeline. Follow these steps exactly using absolute paths.

STEP 1: Run exec with command: ls /home/node/workspace/02_executor_out/
If the output is empty, stop immediately and do nothing else.

STEP 2: Run read on /home/node/workspace/02_executor_out/profiles.md
Read ALL profiles fully.

STEP 3: Write a final recommendation report to /home/node/workspace/03_final_reports/PIPELINE_FINAL.md
The report MUST contain all of these sections, each with substantial content:

# Model Recommendation Report

## Summary
One paragraph summarizing the benchmark: how many models were profiled and the overall quality landscape.

## Speed Analysis
Compare the profiled models by speed. Name the fastest and slowest models with their times in seconds.

## Reliability Analysis
Discuss tool usage correctness and any anomalies found across the profiles.

## Recommendations
Recommend which models are best suited for each pipeline role. State which model you recommend for fast disposable work, which for high-quality analysis, and which models to avoid. Use the word 'recommend' explicitly.

## Use Case Assignments
Assign at least 3 specific models to the roles of planner, executor, and synthesizer in an agent pipeline, with one sentence of justification each.

The report must be at least 450 words and mention at least 3 model names.

STEP 4: Run exec with command: rm /home/node/workspace/02_executor_out/profiles.md

Do not search the web. Use only exec, read, and write. Do not shorten or skip any section.
Current time: Wednesday, June 10th, 2026 - 12:23 AM (UTC)
Reference UTC: 2026-06-10 00:23 UTC

Return your response as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
